name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: At 10475 Alpharetta St in Roswell, GA 30075, TitleMax Title Pawns can be reached at 1-678-352-7738.
description_long:
TitleMax operates as a title pawn lender, offering fast cash loans secured by vehicle titles. The company has been serving the Atlanta area since at least 2004, with multiple physical locations throughout Georgia including the Candler Road SE store established in July 2004. Title pawns function similarly to title loans—borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral to receive immediate funds, with the option to retain vehicle use during the loan period.

The company's primary service is title pawns, available both through in-store visits and an online application process. Customers can apply online, submit vehicle photos for appraisal, receive instant eligibility determination, and then visit a physical store to sign documents and receive cash. TitleMax also offers online personal loans and in-store personal loans as secondary products, managed through separate customer portals. The lending process requires a valid government-issued ID, a clear vehicle title, and a credit check—though the company accepts most credit types.

TitleMax distinguishes itself through operational convenience: same-day cash availability, quick approval timelines, competitive rates, acceptance of most credit profiles, and the ability to continue driving your vehicle while the pawn is active. The Candler Road location has accumulated 465+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating, with customer feedback highlighting staff professionalism and service quality from named employees like Kiara and Andrea. The store maintains extended hours (10am-7pm Monday-Friday, 10am-4pm Saturday) and is bilingual service is not available at this specific location.

The primary caveat is that title pawns are collateral-based lending products with inherent risks: failure to repay results in vehicle loss. While the website emphasizes competitive rates and consumer acceptance, it does not disclose specific APR ranges, fee structures, or repayment terms. The company operates within state regulations and performs credit checks, but markets heavily to those with imperfect credit or urgent cash needs, positioning title pawns as emergency financing rather than a sustainable debt solution.
pros: Same-day cash funding available upon approval and store visit
Online application with vehicle photo appraisal—can apply from home using cell phone
Accepts most credit types, not limited to prime borrowers
Quick approval process with instant eligibility determination online
Borrowers can continue driving their vehicle during the pawn period
Competitive rates compared to other title lenders
Established local presence since July 2004 with 465+ five-star Google reviews
cons: No APR, fees, or specific repayment term details disclosed on website
Risk of vehicle loss if loan is not repaid on time
Bilingual services not available at Candler Road location despite serving diverse Atlanta area
Title pawns are high-cost emergency lending, not sustainable long-term debt solutions
Requires clear vehicle title and government ID—excludes those without these documents
best_for: Atlanta-area residents needing immediate cash with vehicle collateral and fair-to-poor credit
Vehicle owners facing urgent expenses who want to retain driving access during the loan
Borrowers who have been denied traditional personal loans or credit products
Individuals with existing vehicle equity seeking quick approval without extensive underwriting
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Atlanta-area residents with vehicle equity who need immediate cash and have fair-to-poor credit profiles that limit traditional lending options. The critical caveat is that title pawns carry significant risk—vehicle loss upon non-repayment—and the website does not disclose APR or fee structures, making it difficult to assess true cost before applying.
services: Online vehicle appraisal via photo submission
Online title pawn application and pre-approval
Customer account management portals (separate for title pawns vs. personal loans)
